title: Prepare materials for fabrication using jigs and fixtures
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare materials for fabrication using jigs and fixtures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare

pcs.text: Hand tools, equipment and resources are selected and inspected, and faults are repaired or reported1.2 Appropriate lifting equipment is selected and used according to workplace procedures1.3 Work information and working drawings are identified and confirmed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Hand tools, equipment and resources are selected and inspected, and faults are repaired or reported1.2 Appropriate lifting equipment is selected and used according to workplace procedures1.3 Work information and working drawings are identified and confirmed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Hand tools, equipment and resources are selected and inspected, and faults are repaired or reported1.2 Appropriate lifting equipment is selected and used according to workplace procedures1.3 Work information and working drawings are identified and confirmed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare

elements.title: Select and mark out materials

pcs.text: Work health and safety (WHS) requirements and workplace procedures are identified and followed2.2 Materials are selected, marked out and prepared according to job specifications2.3 Defective materials are set aside for scrap or rework
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work health and safety (WHS) requirements and workplace procedures are identified and followed2.2 Materials are selected, marked out and prepared according to job specifications2.3 Defective materials are set aside for scrap or rework?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work health and safety (WHS) requirements and workplace procedures are identified and followed2.2 Materials are selected, marked out and prepared according to job specifications2.3 Defective materials are set aside for scrap or rework.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select and mark out materials

elements.title: Load and unload materials onto jig or fixture

pcs.text: Material and parts are positioned and secured in jig to prevent movement3.2 Materials and parts are loaded and unloaded into jig according to WHS requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Material and parts are positioned and secured in jig to prevent movement3.2 Materials and parts are loaded and unloaded into jig according to WHS requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Material and parts are positioned and secured in jig to prevent movement3.2 Materials and parts are loaded and unloaded into jig according to WHS requirements and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Load and unload materials onto jig or fixture

elements.title: Fabricate parts

pcs.text: Materials are shaped to fit jig and checked against job specifications4.2 Materials positioned in jig are bolted or welded according to job specification4.3 Fabrication process is completed according to workplace procedures4.4 Fabricated components are removed from jig and checked for compliance, and faulty components are returned for rework
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Materials are shaped to fit jig and checked against job specifications4.2 Materials positioned in jig are bolted or welded according to job specification4.3 Fabrication process is completed according to workplace procedures4.4 Fabricated components are removed from jig and checked for compliance, and faulty components are returned for rework?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Materials are shaped to fit jig and checked against job specifications4.2 Materials positioned in jig are bolted or welded according to job specification4.3 Fabrication process is completed according to workplace procedures4.4 Fabricated components are removed from jig and checked for compliance, and faulty components are returned for rework.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Fabricate parts

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Work area, jigs, tools and equipment are cleaned, maintained and inspected according to workplace procedures5.2 Faulty equipment is identified, tagged and reported4.3 Work sheets and production schedule are completed and given to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work area, jigs, tools and equipment are cleaned, maintained and inspected according to workplace procedures5.2 Faulty equipment is identified, tagged and reported4.3 Work sheets and production schedule are completed and given to appropriate personnel?
